what_it_does: Records metadata for a single channel attachment: an image linked to the design-assets channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content
standouts: Target URI contains spaces and parentheses: 'image (35)'
File is purely structural metadata with no descriptive text
conventions: Uses a custom image:// URI scheme
concerns: Target URI includes unescaped spaces and parentheses, which may break naive URI parsing
No title, alt text, or dimensions for the image
No indication of who added the attachment or why
notes: A bare attachment record that points an image asset at the design-assets channel with a timestamp.
questions: Is the image:// URI resolvable by the system?
Why was this attachment added to the design-assets channel?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose is stated; the content matches the form of a channel attachment record.
intention_signals: Track a specific image asset's attachment to the design-assets channel at a precise time.
novelty: The target URI embeds a human-style filename with spaces and parentheses rather than a normalized identifier.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed pointer from a channel to a specific image asset, useful for reconstructing when assets were attached.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment record linking the design-assets channel to the image asset at image://design-assets/icons/image (35) with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record that an image was attached to the design-assets channel on 2026-06-22.
